CVE-2020-12695.title: The Open Connectivity Foundation UPnP specification before 2020-0 ...
CVE-2020-12695.description: The Open Connectivity Foundation UPnP specification before 2020-04-17 does not forbid the acceptance of a subscription request with a delivery URL on a different network segment than the fully qualified event-subscription URL, aka the CallStranger issue.
